title: phyllanthus amarus
intro: Phyllanthus amarus, also known as airy cumin or Phyllanthus niruri, is a small, herbaceous plant belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It is traditionally used in medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including liver and kidney diseases, due to its high content of flavonoids and tannins, which exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and hepatoprotective properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus amarus include reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and aiding in the treatment of fever, jaundice, and diarrhea, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Phyllanthus amarus is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and can also be consumed as a raw herb or used in traditional remedies such as Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
